title: rhamnus neapolitana
intro: Rhamnus neapolitana, also known as the Naples buckthorn, is a plant species that belongs to the Rhamnaceae family. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and infections. Rhamnus neapolitana has been traditionally used to support kidney and liver health, as well as to help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal medicine, it is often prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
